verdict.answer_first: B immediately connects the definition to the benefit in its first sentence: "...so your data stays correct even when things go wrong". A's first sentence is just the definition.
verdict.decisiveness: B provides a more memorable and decisive final heuristic: "Reach for it whenever incorrect data would actually hurt."
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable because it frames the benefit as work I don't have to do: "you can trust the database to protect correctness so your application code doesn't have to."
